overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 navigating through a futuristic metropolis during golden hour. The journey transitions from surface streets to elevated highways, passing through covered bridge sections and open roads with mountain vistas, before plunging into a dense urban canyon filled with holographic billboards and heavy traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban surface street transitioning to elevated highway

events.description: passing beneath an elevated highway overpass into shadowed underpass area
accelerating onto highway merge ramp from surface streets

agents.ego_description: navigating through futuristic city streets and merging onto the elevated highway system

entered.detail: tall glass and steel skyscrapers with geometric facades lining the street
massive concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows on the road below
grey concrete divider separating lanes on the highway ramp
futuristic digital road signs with glowing text indicating directions

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunlit urban surface street surrounded by futuristic glass towers. The driver accelerates onto a highway ramp, passing beneath a massive concrete overpass that temporarily darkens the scene before emerging onto the main elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway bridge with concrete support pillars

events.description: entering a long covered highway section with roof structure overhead
exiting the covered tunnel section into bright golden hour sunlight revealing mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through covered highway sections with brief views of open landscape

entered.detail: enclosed highway tunnel with concrete ceiling and artificial lighting fixtures
massive cylindrical pillars supporting the highway structure at regular intervals
distant desert mountains with reddish-brown rock formations becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The driver travels through a semi-covered highway section with concrete pillars and artificial lighting. The environment transitions from urban to open landscape as the car exits the covered section, revealing expansive desert mountains bathed in golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with mountain backdrop and distant urban skyline

events.description: taking a wide right curve on the highway while overtaking a slower vehicle
approaching dense urban skyline with tall buildings and billboards becoming visible

agents.ego_description: speeding along the open highway with mountain views, overtaking other vehicles while approaching the city center

notable_agents.action: red sports car being overtaken on the right side of the highway

entered.detail: metal safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated highway
expansive mountain range visible on both sides of the highway corridor
cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and towers marking the city center ahead

segments.scene_description: The car speeds along an open highway with expansive views of desert mountains on both sides. The driver overtakes a red sports car while navigating a gentle curve, with the dense urban skyline gradually growing larger on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban highway canyon with holographic billboards and neon advertisements

events.description: entering dense billboard district with massive digital advertisements covering building facades
navigating through heavy traffic with multiple vehicles changing lanes and merging

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through dense urban traffic surrounded by towering holographic billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: black sedan merging into the lane from the right
large truck maintaining steady speed in the left lane

entered.detail: giant holographic advertisement screens covering the sides of skyscrapers with bright neon imagery
bright glowing signs and brand logos in pink, blue, and yellow hues
towering high-rise buildings with glass facades and geometric architectural details
pedestrian bridges and overhead transit structures connecting buildings above the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment plunges into a dense urban canyon where massive holographic billboards and neon advertisements cover every surface. The driver weaves through heavy traffic surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers and elevated walkways, navigating the bustling metropolis as the golden hour light mixes with the artificial glow of countless digital signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a sunlit urban street into a vast desert landscape before plunging back into a neon-drenched city center. It begins by accelerating through glass towers and beneath a darkening concrete overpass, which leads the camera onto an elevated highway. As the car passes through a semi-covered section of pillars and artificial lights, the environment opens up to reveal expansive desert mountains bathed in golden hour light. The scene then speeds along an open road, overtaking a red sports car while the distant urban skyline gradually grows larger on the horizon. Finally, the camera dives into a dense urban canyon where the natural sunlight blends with the artificial glow of massive holographic billboards and neon advertisements amidst heavy traffic and towering skyscrapers.
